title: 突發！手足會見下屆加拿大總理熱門andrew scheer

replies.msg:
突發！有幾突發？突然到個手足鬚都未剃就出黎捉住andrew scheer隻手，質問佢會唔會stand with hong kong同protect freedom in hong kong.

佢係乜水？andrew scheer係現任加拿大保守黨黨魁，如果佢係黎緊既10月21號大選贏得大選，佢就會成為下一任既加拿大總理。

andrew表示，conservative party will always protect freedom and stand with Hong Kong.

感謝winnipeg連鬚都未剃就走出黎既兄弟！

海外陣線有幾重要？係好撚緊要！香港人每日係水深火熱中，面對荷槍實彈，輪姦，跳樓既威脅，我地有責任將香港既情況同全世界講！無論佢係普通到係街頭既𡃁仔𡃁妹，買餸既c9，定係重量級政治人物，我地既責任係將香港每日既實況話俾全世界知！

加拿大既兄弟手足！聽日加拿大時間15號係海外選民登記既最後一日！未登記快手啲去登記，唔好浪費手上既一票！10月21號，加拿大撚！利用手上一票，驅逐共黨！光復香港！

時代革命，光復香港。
If we burn, you burn with us.
This is our duty.
Hong Kong expects all men and women to do their duty.

replies.msg:
加拿大同美國唔同
移民入籍佔人口比例大好多
入咗籍就有得投票
落咗地自然又想拉埋親戚過嚟
為咗唔得失選民 即使保守黨都唔會高姿勢反對移民
實際可以睇每年移民配額畀幾多
自由黨/NDP就有機會擴大
保守黨至少都會維持現狀
焦點放去打擊非法越境/逗留方面

Meanwhile, Olivia Chow, a former member of parliament with the New Democratic Party and Toronto city councillor is urging all Canadians to sign the e-petition.

"I think the Canadian government can take a firmer approach. Whatever it's been doing is not working," she said.

Chow argued an independent inquiry would help get to the bottom of what has transpired in Hong Kong over the last several months, including numerous violent clashes involving police and protestors.
Thousands demonstrate in Toronto against Hong Kong's extradition bill
"Canadians that are interested in human rights, in democracy, both in Hong Kong and in China should sign this petition to say, 'Hey, candidates and political parties, what's your stand?'" she said.

"Every Canadian that feel an urge to support democracy should sign it."
